Description: Path to the data file relative to assets/ (e.g. /data/endpoints.json). The leading / is conventional but optional.
Set to true to enable client-side column sorting
Sort column and direction, applied at build time. Works with or without interactive. Format: column_name or column_name:asc or column_name:desc.
Comma-separated list of columns to display, in the order listed. Also controls column order for JSON/YAML sources where the default is alphabetical.
Comma-separated list of columns to exclude. If both columns and hide are set, columns is applied first.
Column header overrides in key:Label format, comma-separated (e.g. rate_limit:Throttle).
Layout width: wide (full content area) or narrow (two-thirds)
Table style: bordered (borders and striped rows) or borderless (clean minimal look)
Humanize and title-case JSON/YAML keys for headers (e.g. rate_limit becomes Rate Limit). Has no effect on CSV sources. Set to false for raw keys.
Process cell values as markdown. Enables bold, italic, links, inline code, etc. Raw HTML in data will also be rendered -- use only with trusted data.
